list.sql: SELECT e.id, e.student_id, s.name AS student_name, e.course_id, c.course_name, e.start_date, e.end_date FROM Enrollments e LEFT JOIN Students s ON s.id = e.student_id LEFT JOIN Courses c ON c.id = e.course_id ORDER BY e.id DESC

get.sql: SELECT id, student_id, course_id, start_date, end_date FROM Enrollments WHERE id = %s

insert.sql: INSERT INTO Enrollments (student_id, course_id, start_date, end_date) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s)

update.sql: UPDATE Enrollments SET student_id = %s, course_id = %s, start_date = %s, end_date = %s WHERE id = %s

students_select.sql: SELECT id, name FROM Students ORDER BY name

courses_select.sql: SELECT id, course_name FROM Courses ORDER BY course_name
